name: M-55
events: 3 Nov 1943 M-55 fires two torpedoes against the German barge F 472 off Yalta, Crimea in position 44°28'N, 34°10'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
27 Dec 1943 M-55 fires two torpedoes against a German motor torpedo boat off Dvuyakorny, Crimea. Both torpedoes missed their target.
